preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Habitify API Key
preferences.description: Create it in Habitify Settings > API. Required for all commands.

preferences.name: rowColorMode
preferences.title: Row Color Mode
preferences.description: Choose how Raycast should tint habit rows.

commands.description: View and manage today's Habitify habits.

commands.description: View today's overview metrics and streaks.
